headline: New York Stock Exchange Celebrates 50 Years of NYSE Arca Options Trading
summary: NEW YORK, April 10, 2026--The NYSE is celebrating 50 years of options trading on NYSE Arca Options this month.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Intercontinental Exchange, Raises Price Target to $187
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $183 to $187.
